# Lavro

> Personal portfolio website of Lavro, an international student focused on graphic design and creative development.

## About

Lavro is a student specializing in graphic design and creative web development. This site showcases interactive projects, character design pages, and contact information.

## Projects

- [Projects Index](https://lavro.org/Projects/): Project navigation page for all mature projects.
- [Character Forge](https://lavro.org/Projects/CForge/): Character building and data core logic tool with multi-step creation and export.
- [Life Simulator](https://lavro.org/Projects/LSimulator/): Branching event simulation game exploring different life choices.
- [Labs](https://lavro.org/Labs/): Creative experiments and design explorations.
- [D&D Archives](https://lavro.org/DnD/): Fan-made original character (OC) archive based on D&D rules. Not official Wizards of the Coast content.
- [Alberina - D&D Character](https://lavro.org/DnD/Alberina/): Fan-made original character (OC) based on D&D rules. High elf wizard, Wind Reed Travelers. Not official Wizards of the Coast content.
- [Flavilar - D&D Character](https://lavro.org/DnD/Flavilar/): Fan-made original character (OC) based on D&D rules. Dragonborn barbarian, Wind Reed Travelers. Not official Wizards of the Coast content.
- [Credits](https://lavro.org/credits/): Full attribution list of all third-party resources, libraries, fonts, and tools used on this site.

## Contact

- Email: Lavro@lavro.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/Lavr0v0
- Steam: https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561199125299095/
